domain_table.Commands: actions, cancel-task, exec, operations, run, show-action, show-operation, show-task, show-task
domain_table.Notes: All use action/operation/task consistently. Missing: update-action, remove-action.

domain_table.Commands: add-unit, bind, config, constraints, consume, deploy, diff-bundle, expose, integrate, refresh, remove-application, remove-relation, remove-saas, remove-unit, resolved, resume-relation, scale-application, set-constraints, show-application, show-unit, suspend-relation, trust, unexpose
domain_table.Notes: config lacks noun. resolved is verb-only. trust is verb-only. expose/unexpose lack noun. integrate lacks noun.

domain_table.Commands: create-backup, download-backup
domain_table.Notes: Small domain; missing list-backups, remove-backup.

domain_table.Commands: disable-command, disabled-commands, enable-command
domain_table.Notes: Consistent command/command-set naming.

domain_table.Commands: bootstrap, debug-log, help-action-commands, help-hook-commands, juju, migrate, switch, sync-agent-binary, upgrade-controller, upgrade-model, version
domain_table.Notes: Miscellany of meta and global commands. No unifying pattern.

domain_table.Commands: add-k8s, remove-k8s, update-k8s
domain_table.Notes: Consistent k8s noun. Missing show-k8s.

domain_table.Commands: download, find, info
domain_table.Notes: info should be show-info per DE013, or charmhub should be the noun.

domain_table.Commands: add-cloud, autoload-credentials, clouds, default-credential, default-region, remove-cloud, show-cloud, update-cloud, update-public-clouds
domain_table.Notes: autoload-credentials uses credential noun, not cloud. default-credential and default-region are adjective-noun.

domain_table.Commands: controller-config, controllers, destroy-controller, enable-destroy-controller, kill-controller, list-models, models, register, show-controller, unregister, upgrade-controller
domain_table.Notes: models and list-models are model-domain commands registered under controller package. register/unregister lack controller noun.

domain_table.Commands: add-credential, credentials, remove-credential, set-credential, show-credential, update-credential
domain_table.Notes: autoload-credentials is in cloud domain. default-credential is in cloud domain. Missing update at credential granularity.

domain_table.Commands: consume, find-offers, offer, offers, remove-offer, show-offer
domain_table.Notes: consume lacks noun. integrate and remove-relation are in application domain but operate on cross-model relations.

domain_table.Commands: dashboard
domain_table.Notes: Single command. Should be show-dashboard.

domain_table.Commands: firewall-rules, set-firewall-rule
domain_table.Notes: Consistent firewall-rule noun. Missing remove-firewall-rule.

domain_table.Commands: add-machine, machines, remove-machine, show-machine
domain_table.Notes: Consistent machine noun. Missing update-machine.

domain_table.Commands: add-model, destroy-model, dump-db, dump-model, export-bundle, grant, grant-cloud, model-config, model-constraints, model-defaults, model-secret-backend, revoke, revoke-cloud, set-credential, set-model-constraints, show-model
domain_table.Notes: grant/revoke lack model noun. dump-db uses db noun. export-bundle uses bundle noun. Config commands fragmented.

domain_table.Commands: integrate, remove-relation, resume-relation, suspend-relation
domain_table.Notes: integrate lacks noun. No show-relation or add-relation (use integrate).

domain_table.Commands: attach-resource, charm-resources, resources
domain_table.Notes: Consistent resource naming. Missing remove-resource, update-resource.

domain_table.Commands: add-secret, grant-secret, remove-secret, revoke-secret, secrets, show-secret, update-secret
domain_table.Notes: Consistent secret noun. Complete CRUD.

domain_table.Commands: add-secret-backend, model-secret-backend, remove-secret-backend, secret-backends, show-secret-backend, update-secret-backend
domain_table.Notes: Consistent secret-backend noun. Complete CRUD.

domain_table.Commands: add-space, move-to-space, reload-spaces, remove-space, rename-space, show-space, spaces
domain_table.Notes: Consistent space noun. Missing update-space (use move/rename).

domain_table.Commands: debug-code, debug-hooks, scp, ssh, ssh-keys
domain_table.Notes: scp/ssh are passthroughs. debug-code/debug-hooks overlap semantically.

domain_table.Commands: show-status-log, status
domain_table.Notes: Status domain is small and consistent.

domain_table.Commands: add-storage, attach-storage, create-storage-pool, detach-storage, import-filesystem, remove-storage, remove-storage-pool, show-storage, storage, storage-pools, update-storage-pool
domain_table.Notes: import-filesystem uses filesystem noun. storage and storage-pools are list commands.

domain_table.Commands: subnets
domain_table.Notes: Only list command. Missing add/remove/update.

domain_table.Commands: add-unit, remove-unit, show-unit
domain_table.Notes: Consistent unit noun. Missing update-unit.

domain_table.Commands: add-user, change-user-password, disable-user, enable-user, login, logout, remove-user, show-user, users, whoami
domain_table.Notes: login/logout/whoami lack user noun. change-user-password is verbose.

domain_crud_completeness.Read: show-model, model-config, model-constraints, model-defaults, model-secret-backend, dump-model, dump-db
